tluaIndexKeyObject.tlua(32,22): error TLUA7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type '"x"' can't be used to index type 'ByTable'.
  Property 'x' does not exist on type 'ByTable'.
tluaIndexKeyObject.tlua(33,22): error TLUA7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type 'Point' can't be used to index type 'ByThread'.


==== tluaIndexKeyObject.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // Lua tables are keyed by identity as readily as by value: a table, a function, a
    // coroutine, a userdatum and a cdatum are all keys. None of them can name a property,
    // so none of them is expressible as anything but an index signature.
    
    interface Point { x: number; y: number }
    
    interface ByTable { [key: Point]: string }
    interface ByFunction { [key: (a: number) => void]: string }
    interface ByThread { [key: thread]: string }
    interface ByUserdata { [key: userdata]: string }
    interface ByCData { [key: cdata]: string }
    
    declare pt: Point;
    declare fn: (a: number) => void;
    declare th: thread;
    declare ud: userdata;
    declare cd: cdata;
    
    declare byTable: ByTable;
    declare byFunction: ByFunction;
    declare byThread: ByThread;
    declare byUserdata: ByUserdata;
    declare byCData: ByCData;
    
    local s1: string = byTable[pt];
    local s2: string = byFunction[fn];
    local s3: string = byThread[th];
    local s4: string = byUserdata[ud];
    local s5: string = byCData[cd];
    
    // The key domains do not bleed into one another: a table key is not a string key.
    local bad1: string = byTable["x"];
                         ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type '"x"' can't be used to index type 'ByTable'.
!!! error TLUA7053:   Property 'x' does not exist on type 'ByTable'.
    local bad2: string = byThread[pt];
                         ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type 'Point' can't be used to index type 'ByThread'.
    
    // keyof reports the table key.
    type K = keyof ByTable;
    local k: K = pt;
